name: Bank of America® Premium Rewards® Elite Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 75,000 bonus points (a $750 value) after making at least $3,000 in purchases in the first 90 days.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 2x points on travel and dining purchases
Unlimited 1.5x points on all other purchases

annual_credits.name: Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $300 annual travel statement credit

annual_credits.name: Airline Incidental Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $150 annually for airline incidentals (bag fees, lounge passes, etc.)

annual_credits.name: Lifestyle Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 annually for lifestyle conveniences (video streaming, food delivery, fitness, rideshare)

annual_credits.name: TSA PreCheck/Global Entry Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 reimbursement for TSA PreCheck or Global Entry

other_benefits.name: FHR Eligible
other_benefits.description: Fine Hotels & Resorts program eligible (for high-balance BofA clients)

recurring_credits.name: $200 Annual Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 annual credit for travel or dining purchases.

recurring_credits.name: $200 Annual Lifestyle Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 annual credit for streaming, food delivery, fitness, and more.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry/PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 every 4 years for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck.
